description: Target CPU load percentage for stress mode.
name: [stress_cpu_target]

description: Specific websites to run during stress workload. reddit must be included (Tab 1 with new_tab=0).
name: [web_workload]

description: This will actually sleep the DUT (pressing the power button)
name: [sleep_resume_midrun]

description: 1 = mid-run kill msedge and relaunch with 12 foreground sites. Side effect: destroys background Edge tabs (no automatic restore). Default 0 keeps bg tabs alive for the entire run.
name: [edge_close_relaunch]

description: WPRP file to use for perf_utc tracing.
name: [provider]

description: 1 = launch collect_5min_traces.ps1 in the background on the DUT alongside the core trace. Uses a named WPR instance (perfStressHeavy). Saves rolling ETLs to C:\WPR_Traces\<runname>\WPR_<timestamp>.etl. WARNING: dual-session WPR perturbs metrics - debug use only.
name: [bg_heavy_capture]

description: Rolling ETL segment length in minutes for bg_heavy_capture (default 5).
name: [bg_heavy_capture_interval]

description: 1 = open background Edge tabs to increase memory pressure and CPU stress.
name: [bg_edge_tabs]

description: Iterations of the web_bg_tabs site loop. Each iteration opens 5 background Edge tabs. Default 6 = 30 background tabs
name: [bg_edge_tab_loops]

children.description: Propagate perf_stress:bg_edge_tab_loops -> web_bg_tabs:bg_tab_loops (cross-section setParam not expressible in ScenarioMaker UI). Must run before web_bg_tabs is included.

Background heavy WPR capture via collect_5min_traces.ps1 (named instance perfStressHeavy so it does not collide with core unnamed WPR). Gated by perf_stress:bg_heavy_capture=1 inside code_PSECTRC.py - default skip. Debug only - perturbs metrics.
Upload Perf Files and start percentile_stress.py BEFORE Teams/web/prod setup so CPU stress runs throughout the workload (not just the tail end).
Powershell Download

children.command: cmd /c if not exist "%USERPROFILE%\Desktop" mkdir "%USERPROFILE%\Desktop" > nul 2>&1 & if not exist "%USERPROFILE%\Desktop\test.txt" echo test > "%USERPROFILE%\Desktop\test.txt" & exit /b 0
children.description: Create test.txt on Desktop for context menu test

children.command: cmd /c reg add "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" /v SeparateProcess /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f >nul 2>&1 & reg delete "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" /v LaunchTo /f >nul 2>&1 & powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process explorer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -ne '' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue" & exit /b 0
children.description: Close all File Explorer windows for a fresh launch and ensure FE opens to Home (not This PC).
Launch File Explorer from taskbar (click_file_explorer library)
Wait for File Explorer XAML Home to fully render

children.command: cmd /c powershell -NoProfile -Command "$s=New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $s.Windows() | ForEach-Object { try { $_.Quit() } catch {} }"
children.description: Close XAML Home FE via Shell COM (avoids Alt+F4 shutdown dialog risk)
Open File Explorer with test.txt selected
Wait for File Explorer to load Desktop
Capture FE content area for right-click
Right click on test.txt
Wait for Context Menu to render
Dismiss context menu via Escape

children.command: cmd /c powershell -NoProfile -Command "$s=New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $s.Windows() | ForEach-Object { try { $_.Quit() } catch {} }"
children.description: Close File Explorer via Shell COM (avoids Alt+F4 shutdown dialog risk)
Settle after FE close
Launch Snipping Tool overlay (Win+Shift+S)
Wait for Snipping Tool overlay to appear
Dismiss Snipping Tool overlay via Escape
Launch Settings app to Home
Wait for Settings to fully render
Close Settings via taskkill (avoids Alt+F4 shutdown dialog risk)
Settle after Settings close
Delete test.txt from Desktop
App-launch probes
Extra delay for Edge startup under CPU stress

children.command: cmd /c taskkill /IM EXCEL.EXE /IM OUTLOOK.EXE /IM olk.exe /IM WINWORD.EXE /IM POWERPNT.EXE /IM ONENOTE.EXE /F > nul 2>&1 & exit /b 0
children.description: Kill all Office apps so the next launches are real cold starts (otherwise file-association launches just focus existing windows and no metrics are emitted).
Settle after Office kill
Launch Excel via file association
Wait for Excel window (bumped to 12s for stress)
Close Excel
Settle before Word launch
Launch Word via file association
Wait for Word window (bumped to 12s for stress)
Close Word
Settle before PowerPoint launch
Launch PowerPoint via file association
Wait for PowerPoint window (bumped to 12s for stress)
Close PowerPoint
Settle before OneNote launch
Open Start Menu before launching OneNote
Launch OneNote from Start Menu
Wait for OneNote cold boot under stress

children.command: cmd /c taskkill /IM ONENOTE.EXE /IM onenoteim.exe /F > nul 2>&1 & exit /b 0
children.description: Close OneNote
Settle before Outlook launch
Open Start Menu before launching Outlook
Launch Outlook from Start Menu
Wait for Outlook cold boot under stress

children.command: cmd /c taskkill /IM OUTLOOK.EXE /IM olk.exe /F > nul 2>&1 & exit /b 0
children.description: Close Outlook
Settle before Start Menu probe
Open Start Menu
Stabilize, then dismiss Start Menu
Dismiss Start Menu
Win+Tab to invoke Task View
Wait for Task View to render
Dismiss Task View via Escape
Alt+Tab to invoke window switcher
Wait for Alt+Tab to render
Win+A to open Control Center / Quick Settings
Wait for Control Center to fully render
Dismiss Control Center via Escape
Sleep/resume checkpoint before Start Menu launches
Type-to-Search probe via taskbar
Close Notepad opened by search probe
Type-to-Search probe (after sleep/resume to ensure Search index is warm)
Enable short typing for perf_stress
children.name: [short_typing]

children.description: Inner Try: prod_run_no_onenote may fail under stress (e.g., New Email click below threshold). Catch so prod_close and web_switchto still run.

prod_*_open includes the switchto click AND opens the file in one go. Using prod_*_open per-app right before each prod_*_run avoids the dual-window bug we got from a separate prod_open phase + later prod_*_switchto: each file is opened exactly once.
Cleanup runs even if prod_run_no_onenote failed
Switch to Edge runs even if prod_run_no_onenote failed
Close existing Edge tabs before relaunch
Kill and relaunch Edge (same as enterprise_collab)
Kill Powershell Download
Try wrapper for teams teardown (195LNFU call health may fail)
Disable perf/UTC settings (non-UI)

children.command: cmd /c net stop DiagTrack & net start DiagTrack
children.description: Restart DiagTrack
